5.0.short_description: Name of the file from which to import

keywords.name: wall.import.filename
keywords.description: Name of the file from which to import

keywords.name: wall.import.geometry
keywords.description: Name of the geometry set from which to import

keywords.name: wall.import.geometry.keepid
keywords.description: Specify that the facet IDs will be set to the IDs of the geometry {edges in 2D; polygons in 3D}

keywords.name: wall.import.geometry.seed
keywords.description: ID of the geometry {edge in 2D; polygon in 3D} with which to start the stitching process

keywords.name: wall.import.nothrow
keywords.description: Optional keyword indicating that the import will continue in spite of the detection of non-manifold conditions or points falling outside the model domain

examples.command: new domain extent - 2 2 wall import filename gear . stl nothrow id 100 wall rotate axis 1 0 0 angle 90 point 0 0 0 wall group gear range set id 100
